name: remembrance-ecosystem
description: The complete Remembrance pattern ecosystem — oracle, compression, reflection, blockchain, swarm, dialer, CLI, and design.

remembrance-oracle-toolkit.description: Core pattern library, oracle engine, MCP server, and ecosystem hub

Void-Data-Compressor.description: Substrate data compression, learned patterns, and data harvesting

Reflector-oracle-.description: Oracle reflection layer — pattern analysis and quality scoring

REMEMBRANCE-BLOCKCHAIN.description: Public verifiable coordination layer — covenant-filtered pattern hashes on Solana

REMEMBRANCE-AGENT-Swarm-.description: Multi-agent swarm orchestration, consensus, and task dispatch

Remembrance-dialer.description: Universal integration hub with six dialer types

claw-code.description: CLI tool for interacting with the ecosystem

awesome-design-md.description: Design resources and documentation in Markdown

MOONS-OF-REMEMBRANCE.description: Visual moons interface for the Remembrance ecosystem

REMEMBRANCE-Interface.description: Primary web interface for the Remembrance ecosystem

remembrance-api-key-plugger.description: API key management for ecosystem integrations
